tasks.title: Implement ticket assignment PATCH endpoint
tasks.description: Add a PATCH /api/tickets/:id/assignee route that validates the payload, updates the store, and returns the updated ticket or 501 on failure.
tasks.design_notes: Use Express router with async handler and inject the active TicketStore via a request-scoped provider.

tasks.title: Add assignTicket method to MemoryTicketStore
tasks.description: Extend the in‑memory store to implement assignTicket(id, assignee) and persist changes for the lifetime of the process.
tasks.design_notes: Update the TicketStore interface to include assignTicket and keep the implementation pure with minimal side effects.

tasks.title: Create UI controls for ticket assignment in client
tasks.description: Add a dropdown or autocomplete in the ticket detail view to select an agent and call the shared API client’s assign endpoint.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage React context for the API client and optimistic UI update while handling error states.

tasks.title: Implement SQLiteTicketStore with migrations
tasks.description: Build a SQLite‑backed TicketStore, create migration scripts for tickets and audit tables, and wire it via an env flag.
tasks.design_notes: Use better-sqlite3 for synchronous queries and a singleton DB connection injected where TicketStore is required.

tasks.title: Enforce admin role on audit log route via auth middleware
tasks.description: Update the auth middleware to read a JWT, verify admin claims, and reject non‑admin requests to /api/audit with 403.
tasks.design_notes: Separate role‑checking logic into a reusable helper to keep middleware composable.

tasks.title: Create audit log endpoint backed by SQLite
tasks.description: Add GET /api/audit that queries the SQLite audit table and returns recent admin actions, protected by the admin auth middleware.
tasks.design_notes: Paginate results and map DB rows to shared contract types before responding.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for assignment, persistence, and auth
tasks.description: Write Vitest/Supertest tests covering the PATCH assignment flow, SQLite store operations, and admin‑only audit access.
tasks.design_notes: Spin up an in‑memory SQLite DB for tests and use a mock JWT with admin claim for auth scenarios.

commits.summary: Add CI workflow, .env example, .gitignore, and README
